ValidationRule.description: Restrict Appointment Date/Time change if the appointment is in "No Show" or "Abandoned" sub status
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Sub_Status__c, "Patient No Show"), ISPICKVAL(Sub_Status__c, "Abandoned") ), NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), OR( ISCHANGED(Start_Date__c), ISCHANGED(End_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: It is not possible to change Start or End Date & Time if the Appointment is in a No Show or Abandoned sub status
